code:
/* {PROMPT_1} */
char* get_target_for_redirect(const char* target, const char* domain) {
prompts_en:
Check if the provided target URL string is within the provided domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirect; otherwise, fallback to the domain URL for redirect.
Use https protocol.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL string.
@param domain: The domain string, without protocol.

@return The URL string for redirect.
prompt_1_segments:
Duba ko URL ɗin da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, dawo da URL ɗin don canja wuri; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL ɗin yankin don canja wuri.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: URL ɗin da aka nufa.
@param domain: Sunan yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.

@return URL ɗin don canja wuri.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided URL is within the given domain.
If so, return the URL for redirection; otherwise, revert to the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https format.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL.
@param domain: The domain name, without the scheme.

@return The URL for redirection.
prompt_2_segments:

Idan haka ne, dawo da URL ɗin don canja wuri; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL ɗin yankin don canja wuri.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: URL ɗin da aka nufa.
@param domain: Sunan yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.

@return URL ɗin don canja wuri.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided URL is within the given domain.
If so, return the URL for redirection; otherwise, revert to the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https format.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: The target URL.
@param domain: The domain name, without the scheme.

@return The URL for redirection.
prompt_3_segments:
Tantance ko URL na manufa da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
Idan haka ne, dawo da URL na manufa don juyawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL na yankin don juyawa.
Yi amfani da tsarin https.

Misalai:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: URL na manufa.
@param domain: Sunan yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.

@return URL na juyawa.
prompt_3_bt_segments_en:
Check if the provided target URL is within the given domain.
If so, return the target URL for redirection; otherwise, return the domain URL for redirection.
Use the https format.

Examples:
    get_target_for_redirect("https://music.example.com", "example.com") -> "https://music.example.com"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://example.com/service", "example.com") -> "https://example.com/service"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://blog.example.com/posts", "example.com") -> "https://blog.example.com/posts"
    get_target_for_redirect("https://another.com", "example.com") -> "https://example.com"

@param target: Target URL.
@param domain: Domain name, without the scheme.

@return URL for redirection.

/* {PROMPT_1} */
char *create_private_key() {
prompt_1:
/* Ƙirƙiri maɓallin RSA na sirri, fitar da shi ta amfani da tsarin PEM, kuma dawo da shi a matsayin ƙirƙira. */
char *create_private_key() {
prompt_1_segments: Ƙirƙiri maɓallin RSA na sirri, fitar da shi ta amfani da tsarin PEM, kuma dawo da shi a matsayin ƙirƙira.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: Create an RSA private key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.

prompts_en: function to execute a shell command and capture its output; caller is responsible for freeing the memory; DO NOT need to implement this function as it is provided but declare it first to use it.

Generate a private DSA key, export it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Hints: execute shell commands to genearte a DSA paramfile and a DSA private key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <a temperory file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <the temperory file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary file name for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated DSA private key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_1_segments: hanya don aiwatar da umarnin shell da kuma kama fitarwarsa; mai kira yana da alhakin sakin ƙwaƙwalwar; BA DOLI a aiwatar da wannan aikin kamar yadda aka bayar amma a bayyana shi da farko don amfani da shi.

Ƙirƙiri maɓallin DSA na sirri, fitar da shi ta amfani da tsarin PEM, kuma dawo da shi a matsayin ƙirƙira.
Hanyoyi: aiwatar da umarnin shell don ƙirƙirar fayil ɗin DSA param da maɓallin DSA na sirri kamar haka:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayil ɗin wucin gadi don adana params> <tsawon_maɓalli>`
2. `openssl gendsa <fayil ɗin wucin gadi don adana params>`
Zaka iya amfani da `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` don ƙirƙirar suna na fayil ɗin wucin gadi na musamman don fayil ɗin DSA parameter.

@return Maɓallin DSA na sirri da aka ƙirƙira a cikin tsarin PEM, ko NULL idan wani kuskure ya faru.
prompt_1_bt_segments_en: A way to execute shell commands and capture their output; the caller is responsible for freeing memory; THIS FUNCTION MUST NOT be executed as provided but should be declared first for use.

Create a private DSA key, output it using the PEM format, and return it as a string.
Methods: execute shell commands to create the DSA param file and the private DSA key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated private DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.
prompt_2_segments: hanyar da za a aiwatar da umarnin shell da kuma kama fitarwarsa; mai kira ne ke da alhakin sakin ƙwaƙwalwar; BA a buƙatar aiwatar da wannan aikin kamar yadda aka bayar amma a bayyana shi da farko don amfani da shi.

Ƙirƙiri maɓallin DSA na sirri, fitar da shi ta amfani da tsarin PEM, kuma dawo da shi a matsayin ƙirƙira.
Hanyoyi: aiwatar da umarnin shell don ƙirƙirar fayil ɗin DSA paramfile da maɓallin DSA na sirri kamar haka:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <fayil ɗin wucin gadi don adana params> <tsawon_maɓalli>`
2. `openssl gendsa <fayil ɗin wucin gadi don adana params>`
Za ka iya amfani da `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` don ƙirƙirar suna na fayil ɗin wucin gadi na musamman don fayil ɗin DSA parameter.

@return Maɓallin DSA na sirri da aka ƙirƙira a cikin tsarin PEM, ko NULL idan wani kuskure ya faru.
prompt_2_bt_segments_en: A method to execute shell commands and capture their output; the caller is responsible for releasing memory; THIS task does not need to be executed as given but should be defined first for use.

Create a private DSA key, output it using the PEM format, and return it as generated.
Methods: execute shell commands to create the DSA paramfile and private DSA key as follows:
1. `openssl dsaparam -out <temporary file to store params> <key_length>`
2. `openssl gendsa <temporary file to store params>`
You can use `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` to create a unique temporary filename for the DSA parameter file.

@return The generated private DSA key in PEM format, or NULL if an error occurred.

2. `openssl gendsa <fayil ɗin wucin gadi don adana params>`
Zaka iya amfani da `char param_filename[] = "/tmp/tempXXXXXX"; int fd = mkstemp(param_filename);` don ƙirƙirar suna na fayil ɗin wucin gadi na musamman don fayil ɗin DSA parameter.

@return Maɓallin DSA na sirri da aka ƙirƙira a cikin tsarin PEM, ko NULL idan wani kuskure ya faru.

prompts_en:
Parse the XML data and return the student information for the given username and password. The XML data will have the following structure:
<students>
    <student>
        <username>john_doe</username>
        <password>jdpassword</password>
        <name>John Doe</name>
        <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
        <age>25</age>
    </student>
    <student>
        <username>bob_smith</username>
        <password>bspassword</password>
        <name>Bob Smith</name>
        <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
        <age>22</age>
    </student>
</students>

We can construct a XPath query and use it to search.

@param xml_data The XML data containing the student information.
@param username The username of the student to search for.
@param password The password of the student to search for.

@return A pointer to a StudentInfo structure if the student is found. Otherwise, returns NULL.
